message:
test(mermaid): add comprehensive snapshot tests for all diagram families

Add 43 new snapshot tests covering 15 diagram families at 80x24 and
120x40 sizes: flowchart, state, ER, pie, class, gitgraph, journey,
requirement, timeline, quadrant chart, XY chart, block-beta,
packet-beta, architecture-beta, sankey, and C4 variants.

This brings total snapshot coverage from 5 families to 17, with 56
snapshot tests and 58 blessed snapshot files. All 706 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
